signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market forecasts of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[1] This newly released figure (as of early March 2026 data) indicates contained price pressures amid global energy volatility, potentially re
